ideation: This sequence portrays a police officer's authoritative yet controlled stance.  The animation starts with the arms at the sides, then transitions to a hand-on-hip posture on the left side, followed by a hand-on-belt posture on the right side, and then back to a neutral pose. The left hand stays on the hip, emphasizing a calm authority. The right hand moves to the belt, suggesting readiness. This creates a sense of preparedness and control, fitting for a police officer.

frames.beat: officer stands at attention, arms at sides
left hand rests authoritatively on hip
right hand moves to the belt, ready for action
both arms return to a neutral, controlled stance
